name: Tundra Set of 2 Acacia Wood Folding Patio Bar Chair - Natural - Christopher Knight Home
description: These Christopher Knight Home Tundra Set of 2 Acacia Wood Folding Patio Bar Chair gives you a neutral yet sophisticated look that will compliment any outdoor bar area. These Bar Chairs are made of sturdy acacia wood and offers a foot rail to add to the comfort of the stool. When the stool is not in use it can be folded for easy storage. Purchase these Christopher Knight Home Tundra Set of 2 Acacia Wood Folding Patio Bar Chair to add extra seating to your backyard, garden or patio.
